message:
✨ Add app icon, provider dialog, and Android APK build

- Generate clubTivi icon (purple TV + play + signal waves) for all platforms
- Add AddProviderDialog with M3U and Xtream Codes tabs
- Rewrite ProvidersScreen with live provider list from database
- Configure flutter_launcher_icons for Android, macOS, Windows, Linux
- Android SDK configured, release APK builds successfully

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
+<resources>
+    <color name="ic_launcher_background">#0F0E1A</color>
+</resources>
\ No newline at end of file

     source: hosted

@@ -68,10 +68,27 @@ dev_dependencies:
   json_serializable: ^6.9.4
   drift_dev: ^2.22.1
   mockito: ^5.4.5
+  flutter_launcher_icons: ^0.14.4
 
 flutter:
   uses-material-design: true
 
   assets:
     - assets/icons/
     - assets/fonts/
+
+flutter_launcher_icons:
+  android: true
+  ios: false
+  macos:
+    generate: true
+    image_path: "assets/icon/clubtivi-icon.png"
+  windows:
+    generate: true
+    image_path: "assets/icon/clubtivi-icon.png"
+  linux:
+    generate: true
+    image_path: "assets/icon/clubtivi-icon.png"
+  image_path: "assets/icon/clubtivi-icon.png"
+  adaptive_icon_background: "#0F0E1A"
+  adaptive_icon_foreground: "assets/icon/clubtivi-icon.png"
